summary: STORY-020 (checkout order summary) was driven through all four gates by the real Playwright Native Agents (Planner + Generator). Five automate_e2e cases were generated against the running SauceDemo app: the two-step checkout journey, the two money-math guarantees (item total = sum of unit prices; total = item total + tax), a missing-field validation case, and the finish/confirmation flow. All five pass; every risk is covered and passing. The money-math cases read live rendered values and assert computed relationships in integer cents — no hard-coded price constants.
release_recommendation_reasoning: All five E2E test cases pass against the live application; all four risks (RISK-001 wrong item total, RISK-002 inconsistent total, RISK-003 missing-field advance, RISK-004 order-state ambiguity) are covered_passing; zero uncovered high-severity risks and zero bug drafts. The two money-math guarantees are pinned by TC-002 and TC-003, which read the rendered prices/tax/total live and assert their arithmetic relationships in integer cents (no hard-coded constants), so a wrong item total or an inconsistent total would fail the run. The run needed no healing — all tests passed on first execution.
